messages.name: DAS_road
messages.comment: Bytes change when toggling between FSD and AP, as well as Traffic Light and Stop Sign Control in TACC

signals.name: DAS_autosteerEnabled
signals.comment: 1 if Autosteer or FSD is enabled, 0 otherwise

signals.name: rightBlinkerOn
signals.comment: only describes stalk position if half pressed without auto-cancel blinkers. otherwise acts as expected

signals.name: leftBlinkerOn
signals.comment: only describes stalk position if half pressed without auto-cancel blinkers. otherwise acts as expected

signals.name: scrollWheelPressed
signals.comment: captures either scroll wheel left, right or down press
